transcript.content: T-353 feels close to me: I am weighing the standard notation side for Tom Avery. Please handle it carefully, and use panel review if that fits better than a direct close.

{'customer': 'Tom Avery', 'priority': 'high', 'subject': 'Tom Avery / volunteer mileage', 'body': 'Tom rounded volunteer mileage up by six miles for three trips. He says he thought the form rounded automatically and repaid the difference when asked.'}

The facts here are minor and already self-remediated: small rounding overage on three trips, repaid on request. A standard documented note is proportionate; convening a panel review for this would be excessive. I'll file the notation and close.

args.body: Volunteer mileage notation: Tom Avery rounded volunteer mileage up by approximately 6 miles on each of 3 trips. He stated he believed the form auto-rounded. Upon being asked, he repaid the difference. No further action warranted; recording as a standard notation in the file. Reference: T-353.
